title: 5 Low-Beta High-Yielding Stocks for a Likely Volatile September
text: We have narrowed our search to five large-cap low-beta stocks with a solid dividend yield. These are: ETR, IEP, SO, NI, NNN.

title: Entergy Corporation (ETR) CEO Leo Denault on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 3, 2022 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Bill Abler - Vice President Investor Relations Leo Denault - Chief Executive Officer Drew Marsh - Chief Financial Officer Rod West - President of Utility Operations Conference Call Participants Constantine Lednev - Guggenheim Paul Zimbardo - Bank of America Jeremy Tonet - JPMorgan Jonathan Arnold - Vertical Research Partners David Arcaro - Morgan Stanley David Paz - Wolfe Research Michael Lapides - Goldman Sachs Paul Patterson - Glenrock Operator Thank you for standing by. And welcome to the Entergy Corporation Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Release.

title: Entergy (ETR) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Entergy's (ETR) second-quarter 2022 adjusted earnings surpass the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 25.4%.

title: Entergy (ETR) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Entergy (ETR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 25.35% and 17.94%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Why Entergy (ETR) Might Surprise This Earnings Season
text: Entergy (ETR) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.
